LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.QuietMomentSumma: {0} found a rare quiet moment with nothing urgent to do.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Window.DragHint: drag here to move the API explorer
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Header.Subject: Subject
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Status.Tooltip: IsReady={0}; IsExternalApiEnabled={1}. The master switch is in Pawn Diary's main mod settings.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Form.PickMethod: Pick a method from the tree.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.EventKey: Stable adapter event key. It should match an External-domain group defName or another key your adapter documents.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.Summary: Short factual event summary. Pawn Diary uses this as source context, not as final diary prose.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.EventLabel: Optional compact label for grouping and diagnostics. Leave blank to let Pawn Diary fall back to the event key or group label.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ExtraContex: Optional metadata lines. Use one key=value per line. Blank lines and lines starting with # are ignored.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.PromptFragm: Optional extra prompt context owned by the adapter. Use it for facts, not instructions that fight Pawn Diary's system prompt.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.Enchantment: Optional prompt-enchantment candidate lines. Each non-empty line is parsed as one candidate.
Keep leaves existing candidates alone; add appends adapter candidates; replace uses only adapter candidates when any are present.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ForceRecord: For valid write requests, bypass external budget, group/user toggles, and dedup windows. It still requires main-thread readiness, the master integration toggle, required fields, and a diary-eligible subject.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DedupKey: Optional adapter-owned deduplication key. Requests with the same key inside the dedup window collapse.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DedupTicks: Optional dedup window in game ticks. Use 0 or blank for Pawn Diary's default policy.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.PovRole: Optional point-of-view role for previews or reads. Blank lets the API choose the default role.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.PromptInstr: Adapter-owned instruction for SubmitPromptEntry. Pawn Diary still supplies persona, safety, style, and pawn memory.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DirectText: Final subject diary prose for SubmitDirectEntry. This bypasses the main LLM rewrite.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DirectPartn: Optional final partner POV prose. It is used only when a distinct partner pawn is selected.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DirectTitle: Optional subject title. Leave blank if you want title generation or the normal fallback title.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DirectPartn: Optional partner title. It is used only when a distinct partner pawn is selected.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.DirectGener: When enabled, Pawn Diary may generate a missing title even though the body text is caller-authored.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ReadEntryHa: Remembered handles come from submit calls that recorded an entry. Manual eventId+povRole is useful after copying a handle from the log.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ManualEvent: Stable event id to read when you are not using a remembered handle.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ManualPovRo: POV role paired with the manual event id, usually initiator or recipient.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.MaxCount: Maximum number of rows to return for recent-title, context, or bundle reads.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.ApplyQuery: Enable to exercise the overloads that accept DiaryEntryTitleQuery filters.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QDomain: Filter by diary domain, such as External, Interaction, or Machinery.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QAtmosphere: Filter by the atmosphere cue stored on matching diary entries.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QPovRole: Filter by POV role, usually initiator or recipient.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QSourceId: Filter entries created by one integration source id.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QEventKey: Filter entries created with one adapter event key.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QDateContai: Filter by a substring in the display date text.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QHasTitle: Tri-state filter for rows that have a completed title.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QHasGenerat: Tri-state filter for rows that have completed body text.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QIncludeAct: Include hot saved entries that are still active in the diary store.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.QIncludeArc: Include compact archived entries as well as hot entries.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.BundleUseQu: Use the context-bundle overload that accepts a DiaryEntryTitleQuery.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.BundleUseIm: Use the context-bundle overload that accepts includeImportant.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.IncludeImpo: Include important-event context in prompt enchantments or context bundles.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.SetEnabled: Sets the selected pawn's per-pawn diary generation toggle.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.StyleSource: Owner id for this style override. Only the same source id can clear its own override.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.StyleRule: Free-form style rule layered above the pawn's base writing style.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Help.Hooks: Shows the example adapter's live entry-status listener events and pawn-context provider invocation count.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.ReadEntry.Handle: Pick a remembered handle (from a submit), or type eventId+povRole below.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.ReadEntry.NoHand: No remembered handles yet — submit something first.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Hooks.Hint: The example adapter registers a status listener and a trait context provider at game load. Invoke this method to refresh the activity snapshot below.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Log.Empty: No invocations yet — pick a method and press Invoke.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Log.NoSelection: Select an entry to see its detail.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Log.ApiDisabled: External API is disabled in Pawn Diary's main mod settings.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Quick.NotSubmitt: Example event for {0} was NOT recorded: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Quick.ApiDisable: External API is disabled in Pawn Diary's main mod settings.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryExampleAdapter.Quick.BundleLogg: Context bundle for {0} written to Player.log.
